scene: A stick-figure man cheerfully walking in through a casino entrance, glancing down at his wristwatch, a casual confident step, rows of glowing slot machines lit up inside behind him. Selective pop color: the warm glowing casino lights. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

The same stick-figure man hours later, slumped and hunched at a single glowing slot machine, glassy-eyed and absorbed, a half-finished cocktail glass on a small stand beside him. Selective pop color: the glowing slot machine. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

Pulled back to show the whole room around him: bare blank walls with no clock anywhere and no windows at all, just slot machines in every direction, the man tiny and alone in the middle, sealed in. Eerie and closed-in. Selective pop color: the glowing machines. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

A single glowing slot machine erupting with celebration lights, sparkles and confetti while only one tiny coin trickles out of it, a big happy celebration over a tiny payout, the man beside it fooled into feeling like he won. Selective pop color: the bright celebratory lights. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

A confusing maze-like casino floor seen from a high angle, winding twisting patterned-carpet hallways with no visible exit anywhere, the tiny stick-figure man lost and small in the middle of the labyrinth. Selective pop color: the patterned carpet. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

The stick-figure man at the slot machine beaming and oblivious, with faint puppet strings trailing up from his arms to an unseen hand above the frame, his little stack of casino chips quietly shrinking beside him. Oblivious and happy. Selective pop color: the casino chips. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.

A wall mirror in which the man's reflection has been replaced by a plain blank stick figure representing the viewer, also sitting at the same glowing slot machine and looking back out of the mirror, the trap now turned on you. Selective pop color: the glowing slot machine in the reflection. No text, no letters, no numbers, no symbols.
